rules.expression: document.documentElement.scrollWidth <= window.innerWidth
(() => { const h = document.querySelector('header'); return h !== null && h.offsetHeight > 0; })()
(() => { const f = document.querySelector('footer'); return f !== null && f.offsetHeight > 0; })()
(() => { const h1 = document.querySelector('h1'); return h1 !== null && h1.offsetHeight > 0 && h1.textContent.trim().length > 0; })()
(() => { const btns = [...document.querySelectorAll('a, button')].filter(el => /book.*call|discovery/i.test(el.textContent)); return btns.length > 0; })()
(() => { const imgs = document.querySelectorAll('img[src]'); return [...imgs].every(img => img.naturalWidth > 0 || img.complete === false); })()
document.body.scrollHeight >= window.innerHeight
(() => { const els = document.querySelectorAll('h1, h2, h3, p'); return [...els].every(el => el.scrollWidth <= el.clientWidth + 2); })()
(() => { const icons = document.querySelectorAll('link[rel*="icon"]'); if (icons.length === 0) return false; return Array.from(icons).every(icon => !icon.href.toLowerCase().includes('lovable')); })()
(() => { return !document.documentElement.innerHTML.toLowerCase().includes('lovable'); })()

(() => { const nav = document.querySelector('header nav, header'); if (!nav) return false; const links = nav.querySelectorAll('a[href]'); return [...links].some(a => a.getAttribute('href') === '/services' || a.getAttribute('href').endsWith('/services')); })()

(() => { const nav = document.querySelector('header nav, header'); if (!nav) return false; const links = nav.querySelectorAll('a[href]'); return [...links].some(a => a.getAttribute('href') === '/contact' || a.getAttribute('href').endsWith('/contact')); })()

(() => { const f = document.querySelector('footer'); if (!f) return false; const links = f.querySelectorAll('a[href]'); return [...links].some(a => { const h = a.getAttribute('href'); return h === '/services' || h.endsWith('/services'); }); })()

(() => { const f = document.querySelector('footer'); if (!f) return false; const links = f.querySelectorAll('a[href]'); return [...links].some(a => { const h = a.getAttribute('href'); return h === '/contact' || h.endsWith('/contact'); }); })()

(() => { const f = document.querySelector('footer'); if (!f) return false; const links = f.querySelectorAll('a[href]'); return [...links].some(a => /terms/i.test(a.textContent) && a.getAttribute('href') && a.getAttribute('href') !== '#'); })()

(() => { const f = document.querySelector('footer'); if (!f) return false; const links = f.querySelectorAll('a[href]'); return [...links].some(a => /privacy/i.test(a.textContent) && a.getAttribute('href') && a.getAttribute('href') !== '#'); })()

(() => { const f = document.querySelector('footer'); if (!f) return false; const links = f.querySelectorAll('a[href]'); return [...links].some(a => { const h = a.getAttribute('href'); return h && (h.includes('x.com/bedabedagrowth') || h.includes('twitter.com/bedabedagrowth')); }); })()

(() => { const f = document.querySelector('footer'); if (!f) return false; const links = f.querySelectorAll('a[href]'); return [...links].some(a => { const h = a.getAttribute('href'); return h && h.includes('linkedin.com/company/bedabedagrowth'); }); })()

(() => { const sections = document.querySelectorAll('section'); for (const s of sections) { if (/traditional.*cro.*broken|cro.*broken/i.test(s.textContent)) { const ctas = s.querySelectorAll('a[href]'); const linked = [...ctas].some(a => { const h = a.getAttribute('href'); return h === '/services' || h.endsWith('/services'); }); return linked; } } return false; })()

(() => { const sections = document.querySelectorAll('section'); for (const s of sections) { if (/case stud/i.test(s.textContent)) { const ctas = s.querySelectorAll('a[href]'); const linked = [...ctas].some(a => { const h = a.getAttribute('href'); return h && h.includes('calendly.com/kanika-misra'); }); return linked; } } return false; })()

(() => { const sections = document.querySelectorAll('section'); for (const s of sections) { if (/our difference/i.test(s.textContent)) { const arrows = s.querySelectorAll('svg, [class*="arrow"], [class*="line"], path'); return arrows.length > 0; } } return false; })()
